EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} removed a database user on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created a database user on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not change a database user list on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not remove a database user on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed a database user list on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not create a database user on host {event_src.host}
